mapper.select: select id, username, phone, email, password, nickname, avatar, status, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time, is_delete from user where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into user(username, phone, email, password, nickname, avatar, status, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time, is_delete) values (#{username}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{isAnonymous}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDelete})

insert into user(username, phone, email, password, nickname, avatar, status, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time, is_delete) values
(#{entity.username}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.email}, #{entity.password}, #{entity.nickname}, #{entity.avatar}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isAnonymous}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.isDelete})

insert into user(username, phone, email, password, nickname, avatar, status, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time, is_delete) values
(#{entity.username}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.email}, #{entity.password}, #{entity.nickname}, #{entity.avatar}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.isAnonymous}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.isDelete})
on duplicate key update username = values(username), phone = values(phone), email = values(email), password = values(password), nickname = values(nickname), avatar = values(avatar), status = values(status), is_anonymous = values(is_anonymous), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), is_delete = values(is_delete)
mapper.update:
update user
username = #{username},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
password = #{password},
nickname = #{nickname},
avatar = #{avatar},
status = #{status},
is_anonymous = #{isAnonymous},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
is_delete = #{isDelete},
where id = #{id}
